name: Turkey-Asparagus Roll-em-Ups
recipeInstructions:
1. If using fresh or frozen asparagus spears, steam them until just tender.
2. Cut the spears uniformly to fit the length of the turkey slices.
3. Combine the mayonnaise and mustard in a bowl and mix thoroughly.
4. Trim the crusts from the bread and cut each slice into 4 equal 1-inch-wide strips.
5. Spread the mayonnaise-mustard sauce on each toast strip.
6. Sprinkle lightly with chopped almonds.
7. Place an asparagus spear on the bread strip and roll up in a turkey slice.
8. Fasten the roll securely with a cellophane-tipped toothpick.
9. Refrigerate until serving time. Makes 30.
Special Hints:
- Use packaged turkey slices from the market or deli, as fresh turkey slices won't work well for this recipe.
- Trim the asparagus spears at the stalk end to leave the pointed tips exposed, adding a decorative touch that extends slightly beyond the turkey slice.
